mano_cua.result_summary: MdViewer内联模式(.markdown-inline)中<strong>标签computed display为block而非inline：Spellcasting特性的'At Will:'、'2/Day Each:'、'1/Day Each:'三个加粗文本各独占一行(宽335px≈父容器宽度)，产生不必要换行和块级间距
mano_cua.last_reasoning: In the Lich monster page Spellcasting section, all <strong> elements inside .markdown-inline container have computed display: block instead of expected inline. The bold text 'At Will:', '2/Day Each:', '1/Day Each:' each occupies a full line (335px width = parent width), confirming block-level rendering that breaks inline mode expectations.
